title: Sector Beta
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sector Beta''' was a sector in the [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']] space station. It provided the headquarters for the local station security forces and a reduced [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison.

==Defensus Solar headquarters==
Sector Beta provided the headquarters of [[Defensus Solar]]. Their base of operations was an [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] attached to the original [[KV-29233-44B|Zirtran barge]]. Connected to this corvette were a number of vessels also serving as part of the Defensus Solar headquarters. Two older vessels attached to the corvette functioned as barracks, investigations and forensics. An old passenger liner had been converted into a detention center for prisoners.<ref name="Zirtran's Anchor (article)">{{JournalCite|5|Zirtran's Anchor (article)}}</ref>

==Imperial Customs base==
A small [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] base was also placed in Sector Beta. A small barge served as the Imperial base of operations in [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']]. It provided a small docking bay for one squadron of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] and two [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray blastboats]].<ref name="Zirtran's Anchor (article)" />

Most of the commanding personnel were plain bored, and many of them were almost at the end of their careers and just wanted to serve the Empire as uneventfully as possible. They would often leave as much works as possible to the Densus Solar group, who were in charge of the security aboard the station. The younger commanding officers were often dissatisfied serving on ''Zirtran's Anchor'' and wished themselves elsewhere.<ref name="Zirtran's Anchor (article)" />

Several [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] platoons as well as two [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] squads served aboard the station, but had very little to do.<ref name="Zirtran's Anchor (article)" />
